svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="d3" id="d3"> <mxGraphModel dx="-654" dy="-249" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1260" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="GRP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="一次配置变更的完整时序：写库加密 → evict 失效 → 下次请求按新配置重建" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="830" width="1200" x="30" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="H_ADMIN" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="运营后台
Admin" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="60" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="H_CTRL" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="ConfigController
Ctrl" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="220" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="H_SVC" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="TenantAiConfig
Service" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="390" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="H_AES" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="AesEncryptor
AES" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="560" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="H_DB" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="tenant_ai_config
DB" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="720" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="H_FAC" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="TenantChatModel
Factory" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="900" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="H_CACHE" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="ConcurrentHashMap
Cache" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="1070" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L_ADMIN" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="125" y="130" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="125" y="800" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L_CTRL" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="290" y="130" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="290" y="800" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L_SVC" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="460" y="130" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="460" y="800" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L_AES" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="625" y="130" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="625" y="800" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L_DB" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="795" y="130" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="795" y="800" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L_FAC" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="970" y="130" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="970" y="800" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L_CACHE" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1145" y="130" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1145" y="800" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M1" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="1. PUT /config {provider:glm, apiKey:新Key}"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="125" y="180" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="290" y="180" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M2" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="2. saveConfig(dto)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="290" y="220" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="460" y="220" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M3" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="3. encrypt(新Key)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="460" y="260" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="625" y="260" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M4" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="4. 密文"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="625" y="300" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="460" y="300" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M5" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="5. upsert(tenant_id=1024)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="460" y="340" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="795" y="340" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NOTE1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#5eead4;fillColor=#f0fdfa;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="写库后主动 evict，旧实例被丢弃，配置秒级生效、不重启" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="320" x="460" y="386" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M6" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="6. evict(1024)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="460" y="440" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="970" y="440" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M7" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="7. remove(1024)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="970" y="480" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1145" y="480" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SEP" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="60" y="516" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1220" y="516" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NOTE2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#2563eb;fillColor=#dbeafe;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="（稍后）某租户发起对话 → 缓存已空，走 createForTenant 用新配置重建" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="420" x="460" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M8" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="8. 某租户发起对话"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="125" y="590" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="290" y="590" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M9" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="9. getOrCreate(1024)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="290" y="630" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="970" y="630" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M10" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="10. computeIfAbsent 未命中"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="970" y="670" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1145" y="670" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M11" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="11. getRawConfig(1024)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="970" y="710" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="460" y="710" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M12" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="12. decrypt(密文) → 新明文Key"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="970" y="750" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="625" y="750" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M13" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;fontStyle=1;" value="13. 用 glm 默认值 + 新Key 构建新实例 → 写入缓存 → 返回新 ChatModel(glm)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="970" y="790" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="125" y="790" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
